testimonials.title: older students' testimonials
testimonials.firstTestimonial: I have been a student at Welude Birhan for the past 5 years, and I can confidently say that it has been an incredible experience. The teachers are knowledgeable and passionate about their subjects, and they create a welcoming and supportive environment for all students.
testimonials.secondTestimonial: Welude Birhan has helped me grow both academically and personally. The curriculum is challenging, but the teachers are always available to provide guidance and support. I have learned so much during my time here, and I am grateful for the opportunities that this school has provided me.
testimonials.thirdTestimonial: I have made lifelong friends at Welude Birhan, and I have had the chance to participate in a variety of extracurricular activities. The school encourages students to explore their interests and develop their talents, and I have been able to pursue my passion for music and art while also excelling academically.
testimonials.fourthTestimonial: Overall, I would highly recommend Welude Birhan to any student who is looking for a challenging and rewarding educational experience. The teachers are dedicated to helping students succeed, and the school provides a supportive and inclusive community that fosters growth and learning.

objectives.title: holy trinity sunday school
objectives.mission: to prepare a generation that knows the faith, dogma, canon and tradition of the Ethiopian orthodox tewahdo church and is spiritually mature, academically competent, and demonstrates integrity in service to the country and the church.
objectives.vision: to nurture a generation that knows, preserves and protects the dogma, canon and tradition of the Ethiopian orthodox tewahdo church; is spiritually strong in their spiritual life; is well-versed in both spiritual and modern education; and is a generation that is grounded in faith and practice. By 2025, to make the sunday school a model institution that is self-sufficient in all aspects and accessible to all.
coreValues: wholeheartedly serving God with heart, soul, and strength
focusing on practical Christianity (being a witness)
observing the law and order of the church: respecting and honoring
teaching the saints and the unchanging apostolic faith for generations in a consistent manner
serving the holy church faithfully and diligently with the grace given to us
objectives: to provide a comprehensive understanding of the Ethiopian orthodox tewahdo church's faith, dogma, canon, and tradition
to cultivate spiritual maturity and personal growth in students
to promote academic excellence and critical thinking skills
to instill a sense of integrity, responsibility, and service to the community and the church
to foster a supportive and inclusive learning environment that encourages collaboration and mutual respect among students and teachers
objectives.moto: we stand on the faith, we grow in knowledge, we will together on service
